rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff David Bryans Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Court Order To Return Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 15, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN's Motion For Court Order To Return Undertaking DENIED. Moving party failed to meet both requirements of CCP 995.360(b). Defendant's request for award of undertaking is not considered as not properly before the Court at this time per CCP 996.440. = (501/GLW)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 15, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS RALAN WONG and PATTY HERNANDEZ's Motion To Stay Proceedings GRANTED. = (501/GLW)
